writing.task1: Dear Maânger, I am writing about recurring water leakage from the ceiling above my kitchen since the recent renovation. Despite earlier repair attempts, the issue continues. I have photos to share and kindly ask for a written plan with inspection and repair dates. If work takes over three days, please consider temporary accommodation or a rent adjustment
writing.task2: I agree that universities should replace high-stakes exams with continuous assessment because it reduces stress and gives a fairer picture of student performance over time. For example, weekly assignments in my course encouraged steady learning rather than last-minute cramming. A strong counter-argument is that exams test focus under pressure, which matters in real life. However, continuous assessment can still include timed tasks, balancing fairness and resilience
writing.task3: Metro led in ridership (9.2M), reliability (91%), and low cost ($1.60), with solid growth (+6%). Bus carried 5.4M at higher cost ($2.10) and lower punctuality (78%), growing only +3%. BRT was mid-range: 3.0M riders, good reliability (88%), moderate cost ($1.85), fastest transit growth (+9%). Bike-share was smallest (1.1M) but cheapest ($0.90) and fastest overall growth (+22%). Recommendation: modestly shift funding from buses toward expanding bike-share and BRT, which show higher growth and efficiency
